**[Discuss this project in the forums](/web/20020626234113/http://gamedev.net/community/forums/topic.asp?key=gdshow&uid=367&forum_id=22&Topic_Title=XenoHammerGL)**

**Description**:

Selected as an Independent Games Festival winner look for XenoHammer at the GDC. (www.igf.com)

Requires: OpenGL accelerator
XenoHammer is the next generation of RPG shooters. You must upgrade and customize your ship as your progress through the campaign. Take note, only a skilled pilot with the most powerful ship can hope to defeat the alien invasion. XenoHammer is the hard work of 4 students from Georgia Tech. This version is final. However, from feedback we recieve from players like you, we hope to tweak the gameplay and make the game more fun. XenoHammer is powered by the awesome ClanLib (www.clanlib.org) game libraries. Goto http://saberx88.tripod.com to find out more about XenoHammer.

**How to Play**:

Playing the game: Keyboard and Joystick (4 button) supported

CONTROLS:
Directional control - Up, Down, Left, Right Arrows or joy pad

Fire - Space or joy button 1

Speed setting - 'Q' or joy button 2

Power Setting - 'W' or joy button 3

Armor Setting - 'E' or joy button 4

Escape booster - 'Esc' hit this key to dump all RU's into engines and warp back to the mother ship

**Genre**:

Action/Arcade

**Platform**:

Windows
